content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.1%, Bank Nifty -1.1%, VIX +8.4% to 18.26, PSU Bank -2.2%, Realty -2.7%, Energy -1.5% — broad-based risk-off with vol expansion. Pharma (+0.59%) and select FMCG are the only green pockets. Existing book has held up reasonably (unrealized +₹5k) but realized -₹28k today. With 41 mins to close and VIX spiking, focus is on locking in winners via trailed SLs and very selective additions.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24000
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ETF -1.3%, SL 121 sits ~2% below CMP 123.45 — defensive hold, VIX spike supports gold tail. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marico +3.2% at all-time-high ₹846. SL 838 already sits at ~1% below CMP (entry + breakeven cushion). Per trail-gap discipline 1% floor, holding SL at 838 — tightening further would fire on normal noise. Q4 beat + MOFSL TP 950. HOLD via no-op MODIFY; emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.5% post Q4 +134% YoY. Current SL 1365 is already ~1% below CMP 1378.50 — at the trail-gap floor. Q4 result already printed; thesis intact. No-op MODIFY — keeping SL where it is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +1% at ₹2817, SL 2740 (~2.7% below CMP). Q3 PAT +60% YoY; Q4 not yet released. Bullish MACD crossover. Hold with current SL — not enough cushion to tighten without violating trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB flat at entry, near 52w high ₹9096 with 3.3x volume. SL 8950 (~1.6% below CMP). FY26 PAT +32%, Rs 47 final div. Hold with original SL — too tight to trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.5%, CMP 10602, SL 10440 (~1.5% below). Q4 +103% PAT, Rs 12000 buyback record date May 29 = price floor. Held position has near-term catalyst protection. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.9% but Q4 PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance raised to low-double-digit. SL 470 (~1.5% below CMP 479). Thesis intact, within drawdown budget. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.6% at ₹1270.50. Current SL 1255 sits ~1.2% below CMP — already at trail-gap floor. Kotak has Sell with TP 800 (overhang). No-op MODIFY — keeping SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1230.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM +1.4% at 1264.90, post-Q4 16% UVG, broker upgrades. Current SL 1198 is ~5.3% below CMP — too loose given +1.4% gain. Tighten SL to 1230 (~2.7% below CMP, safely beyond trail-gap floor) to lock in partial cushion. Target unchanged 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.5%, SL 850 (~1.3% below CMP 861). 3.2x volume today, order book +61% YoY. Hold within SL budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP flat, near 52w high. Q4 results May 20 — binary event ~6 sessions away, NOT within 3-session window yet. HSBC TP 9000. Hold SL 7950 (~1.7% below). Will reassess as May 20 approaches per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA +0.3% at 1880 (52w-high zone). Q4 results May 21 — outside 3-session window. Organon $11.75B deal raises leverage. SL 1830 (~2.7% below). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LALPATHLAB -1% at 1653, SL 1610 (~2.6% below). Research sentiment BEARISH (-0.10) on Tata 1mg disruption + Q4 margin pressure. Within SL budget; will let SL fire if thesis breaks rather than preemptive exit (Rule 17). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TORNTPHARM +0.1%, SL 4360 (~4% below CMP 4544). Q4 results May 21 — outside 3-session window. Pharma sector strength, JB merger advancing. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, SL 2% below CMP — at floor."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at trail-gap floor; tightening further would self-stopout."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1365 already at ~1% below CMP — trail-gap floor reached."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Modest gain, SL within budget."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat at entry, SL 1.6% below — holding."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback record date May 29 provides floor."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within drawdown budget, Q4 beat thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor 1.2% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1230.00, "reasoning": "Trailing SL up from 1198 to 1230 to lock-in cushion on +1.4% winner; ~2.7% below CMP, safely beyond trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL ~1.3% below CMP — at floor."},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 May 20 — will revisit per Rule 11 as event approaches."},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 May 21 outside 3-session window; SL ~2.7% below."},
    {"symbol": "LALPATHLAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Bearish research overhang but within SL budget; respect SL per Rule 17."},
    {"symbol": "TORNTPHARM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 May 21 outside window; SL gives 4% room."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Qualifying BULLISH candidates this batch with material modifiers: BHARATFORG (+0.08, FY27 25% rev guidance), MCX, THERMAX, KOTAKBANK. Rejection rationale per Rule 18: (1) BHARATFORG — near 52w high ₹2026, intraday data thin (only 4 candles printed), VIX spike + Auto sector -1.4% today makes a fresh-high breakout entry unattractive in a risk-off tape; skip. (2) THERMAX — already gapped +12.6%, extended, no fresh entry. (3) KOTAKBANK — Bank Nifty -1.1% with PSU Bank -2.2%, sector under stress; relative strength is noted but not actionable against tape. (4) MCX — already extended near 52w high. (5) PERSISTENT/INFY/HCLTECH — IT sector flat to weak; COFORGE already provides cluster exposure. (6) UPL — governance overhang per Rule 13, NO_ACTION. (7) BIOCON — neutral setup. (8) ASIANPAINT — defensive but no decisive trigger today. With 41 mins to close, VIX +8.4%, broad-tape -1.1%, and 55% already deployed across 14 names, adding to a risk-off late-session tape would be poor risk-reward. Cancelling stale HFCL MIS order from 130 hours ago — but per schema MIS pending order can stay (will likely auto-expire / let it sit, no fresh action this tick).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 55%, cash 45%. Today's realized -₹28k from earlier session; current unrealized +₹5k. With VIX spike and broad -1% tape, defensive posture is justified — but per Rule 18 I've walked every qualifying BULLISH watchlist candidate above with explicit per-name reject reasons (not 'we already have enough'). Pending TATACONSUM BUY @1240 LIMIT from 456 mins ago is stale — CMP 1264.90 well above limit; either it fills on a pullback or expires. Leaving it open since 1240 is still a tactically OK level if mkt sells off into close. HFCL MIS order 130 hours stale — clearly leftover from prior session, would have auto-cancelled per MIS rules; no action needed. Tomorrow: revisit APOLLOHOSP (Q4 May 20) and SUN/TORNTPHARM (May 21) for Rule-11 pre-event disposition."
}
